items.title: when software had a soul there was a moment around 2005 when using a Mac felt like touchi…

items.description: when software had a soul there was a moment around 2005 when using a Mac felt like touching something alive. the dock bounced. the genie effect swooped. exposé scattered your windows like cards on a table. none of it was strictly necessary…
